title: Monterey Kitchen, Butler’s Pantry & Wardrobe
summary: Multi-space joinery project in Monterey combining a full kitchen, butler’s pantry shelving and a custom wardrobe fitout.
heroAlt: Monterey kitchen with stone island, oven stack and full-height cabinetry
overview: This Monterey project is one of the clearer examples of a multi-room joinery brief being resolved as one coherent scope. Rather than treating the kitchen, pantry and bedroom storage as unrelated upgrades, the project carries one finish direction and one level of detailing across the spaces.
materials: Handleless kitchen cabinetry with stone island benchtop
Full-height oven stack and integrated fridge cavity
Sink run with dishwasher integration and window splashback
Walk-in butler’s pantry with L-shape open shelving
Custom wardrobe with black framed ribbed glass doors and brass hardware

afterImages.alt: Monterey kitchen full view — island, oven stack, sink run and overhead cabinetry
afterImages.caption: Full kitchen view showing the stone island, full-height oven stack, sink run and overhead cabinetry — the whole scope in one shot.

afterImages.alt: Monterey kitchen full-height oven stack and tall pantry cabinetry
afterImages.caption: Full-height oven stack with double ovens and tall pantry cabinetry alongside — the appliance wall designed to hold everything without breaking the clean handleless front.

afterImages.alt: Monterey kitchen sink side with dishwasher, drawers and window splashback
afterImages.caption: Sink side of the kitchen — dishwasher integration, finger-pull drawers, stone benchtop and overhead cabinets running the full length of the window.

afterImages.alt: Monterey butler’s pantry with L-shape walk-in shelving
afterImages.caption: Walk-in butler’s pantry with L-shape open shelving — enough depth and height to keep the main kitchen completely clear.

afterImages.alt: Monterey wardrobe with black framed ribbed glass doors and brass hardware — front view
afterImages.caption: Wardrobe joinery with full-height black framed ribbed glass doors and brass handles — a strong design statement that works just as hard as the kitchen.

afterImages.alt: Monterey wardrobe with black framed ribbed glass doors — angle view showing depth
afterImages.caption: Angle view of the wardrobe showing the depth of the joinery and how the ribbed glass panels sit within the black frame on three sides.

spaces.title: Kitchen
spaces.text: The kitchen was laid out so the island, sink run, oven stack and pantry connection all work together as one resolved scope — not separate pieces bolted together.
spaces.alt: Monterey kitchen full view with stone island and full-height cabinetry

spaces.title: Butler’s pantry
spaces.text: Walk-in L-shape shelving gives the kitchen proper back-of-house storage. Everything has a place and the layout makes it easy to find.
spaces.alt: Monterey butler’s pantry with L-shape walk-in shelving

spaces.title: Wardrobes
spaces.text: Custom wardrobe joinery with black framed ribbed glass doors and brass hardware — bedroom storage that holds the same premium finish direction as the rest of the home.
spaces.alt: Monterey wardrobe with black framed ribbed glass doors and brass handles

outcome: The result feels cohesive because the kitchen, pantry and wardrobe joinery all read as part of one considered fitout instead of isolated room updates.
ctaText: If you are planning a multi-room joinery project in Monterey or Bayside, send through your scope and we can help shape the right next step.
